content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — Description claims "AI-powered suggestions", "Built-in ad blocker", and "Works fully offline", but ContentView.swift (App/ContentView.swift:1-19) shows only a plain SwiftUI to-do list with no ML/AI framework imports, no ad-blocking/content-filter code, and no offline-storage/persistence logic implemented.
Pierre: Apple's reviewers actively test marketing claims against real app behavior, and unsubstantiated feature claims like these are a common cause of 2.1/2.3 rejections. The only implementation found is a simple in-memory task list — no CoreML/Vision usage, no NEFilterProvider/ad-block logic, and no persistence for offline use. Either implement these features or remove the "AI-powered", "ad blocker", and "fully offline" claims from the description before submission.
